reviews.review_description:
Good detailed models to put together in VR.

Various objects to choose, manipulate and piece back together. Rotate, turn and zoom in on the detailed models.

Simple and relaxing gameplay… nice music.

Can purchase extra model packs in game.

Nice, simple, relaxing game.

It took me awhile to get my bearings. I thought I understood the tutorial but I skipped the last step when moving the object outline, which kept it from becoming stationary, so it was impossible to place any pieces.
When I first downloaded a free pack from the store, something went wrong and I was never able to access it or anything else.
I uninstalled & reinstalled the app. Things worked fine from that point on.
I was able to download a free puzzle. I tried easy, medium and hard on the same object just to see the difference. 
As someone who loves vr puzzles, I found this to be a new & different approach. You can use both hands, one to rotate the object outline & the other to hold a puzzle piece. The outline highlights the piece as a hint, if you want.
I recommend this app. I only gave it 4 stars because I had to uninstall & reinstall to make it work.

developer_response.body: Hello, sorry that you couldn't solve the puzzle right away! Most puzzle packs are free and have to be downloaded for hardware reasons. Feel free to download the four starter packs with lots of puzzles. Feel free to contact us, we would be very happy to help you if you still don't see the Christmas pack.

reviews.review_title: Can't get to play the puzzles
reviews.review_description: Hi I have brought this fab little puzzle game but got in to the game but can't get  any puzzles up to play ,when I pressed play it does nothing its just blank white screen with the options on the left side,    ...sonthing isn't working correctly some how

developer_response.body:
Hello Kari,

you can select the puzzles via the store! At the beginning you have to download the puzzles first - this is for technical reasons. There are four starter packs with numerous Assemble! puzzles in the main version and there is now also a new Christmas puzzle pack to download for free. 

The game is designed to be constantly updated with new puzzles so that you can have long-lasting puzzle fun.

reviews.review_description: This a great puzzle game, the interactive mechanics make it easy to pick up items, move around, and place to build your puzzle. The finished puzzle is great too, very detailed.  I can see me going to this game when I want to chill, and have some easy going down time and as this is early access I look forward to where they take it in the future with the addition of new puzzles.  It can be limitless.

The basic premise is fine and works well enough, though you can't switch pieces between your hands without letting go of them, in which the very idd choice of making them float around and away in zero-G was made by the developers and makes this just a touch mire annoying than necessary. Though the game is still very enjoyable once getting used to that design quirk.
Now the other odd design choice made come in how the game is delivered. You buy the game, but it comes with absolutely nothing.
There are 4 free Starter Packs you have to "Purchase" in-game and download (all 4 separate downloads...).
This is a redundant method and a huge waste of time, even more so with the 2nd issue that plagued me just now...
I tried to download all 4 starter packs for future play. Spent way too long downloading them all, just to be shown that I could only get 1 to 2 packs's levels at any time!
I have to delete them and DOWNLOAD YET AGAIN the packs I would want to play, so on top if the moronic decision to make the BASE GAME 4 seperate downloads, now I've got to delete and redosnlosd EVERY TIME I want to play certain levels...

}-UPDATE:- So starting it up again, all of the levels are now showing up. I'm thankful for that, but it's an issue that would've been easily avoided if the base game just came with these Started Packs to begin with instead of making the application itself just a DLC launcher with nothing else.

Who doesn’t love a unique puzzle game.
With a slight twist on puzzles, this is a great concept and so unique.
I have only been in a short while but already has me gripped.

Sit on the sofa, pick a puzzle and let the magic begin.
Good job guys.

This game is a gem! Perfect for those mellow VR sessions, Assemble is all about satisfying puzzle snaps and a chill vibe, not brutal mayhem. With pass-through mode, I can avoid knocking over my coffee (or spooking the cat!). Great for a mental breather before big days, and worth every penny.

4/5. Catch more of my VR takes on my YouTube channel "Jumpers Filmed in VR" EEERRRUUUFFF!!!
